author: optimus-fulcria
title: Scan-target-controlled code execution via unsandboxed plugin auto-loading
notes: Confirmed: discovery.py loads .desloppify/plugins/*.py from the scan target via exec_module() with no consent gate, sandboxing, or warning. get_project_root() resolves to the scanned directory, so scanning an untrusted repo executes attacker-controlled code. This is a genuine design flaw — a code analysis tool should not execute code from its analysis target. S120 has timestamp priority over duplicates S126, S146, S225.
